name: Amcor Plc
analysis: AMC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$58.8600. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$60.6000, stop A$53.7966, target A$67.8183 (1.06:1) — then trail it.
